headline: The Bull Case For Archer-Daniels-Midland (ADM) Could Change Following An Earnings Beat And Dividend Hike
summary: Archer-Daniels-Midland recently reported fourth-quarter 2025 results that beat earnings estimates despite lower revenues, while also lifting its quarterly dividend by 2% and extending its streak to 94 consecutive years of uninterrupted payouts. The company’s 2026 adjusted EPS guidance of US$3.60–US$4.25, alongside expectations for operating profit growth in Ag Services & Oilseeds and continued organic expansion in Nutrition, underscores management’s confidence in the underlying business...
